recommendations.title: Lilo & Stitch
recommendations.overview: The wildly funny and touching story of a lonely Hawaiian girl and the fugitive alien who helps to mend her broken family.

recommendations.title: A Shaun the Sheep Movie: Farmageddon
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Adventure, Animation, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: When an alien with amazing powers crash-lands near Mossy Bottom Farm, Shaun the Sheep goes on a mission to shepherd the intergalactic visitor home before a sinister organization can capture her.

recommendations.title: Elio
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Science Fiction, Adventure, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Elio, a space fanatic with an active imagination, finds himself on a cosmic misadventure where he must form new bonds with eccentric alien lifeforms, navigate a crisis of intergalactic proportions and somehow discover who he is truly meant to be.
recommendations.director: Adrian Molina, Domee Shi, Madeline Sharafian

recommendations.title: Occupation: Rainfall
recommendations.overview: Two years into an intergalactic invasion of Earth, survivors in Sydney, Australia, fight back in a desperate ground war. As casualties mount by the day, the resistance and their unexpected allies, uncover a plot that could see the war come to a decis

recommendations.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
recommendations.overview: An alien is left behind on Earth and saved by the 10-year-old Elliott who decides to keep him hidden in his home. While a task force hunts for the extra-terrestrial, Elliott, his brother, and his little sister Gertie form an emotional bond with their

recommendations.title: Zenon: The Zequel
recommendations.genres: Family, TV Movie, Adventure, Comedy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Zenon Kar is 15 and lives on a space station which the military has taken over and is dismantling. She receives a mysterious signal and must convince everyone that it's from aliens who have come to help them.

recommendations.title: The Cathedral
recommendations.overview: Story of a pilgrim who comes to the Cathedral on the border of the known world. He wants to find answers. He finds tranquility.

recommendations.title: The Boy Who Cried Werewolf
recommendations.overview: A Californian family inherits a castle in Romania. This is especially exciting to the son, who is obsessed with monsters. And he is not disappointed.

recommendations.title: Phineas and Ferb The Movie: Across the 2nd Dimension
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, TV Movie, Science Fiction, Adventure, Action
recommendations.overview: Phineas and Ferb get trapped in an alternate dimension where the evil Doofenshmirtz rules the tri-state area. They must find a way back home with the help of their pet platypus named Perry, who they discover is a secret agent.

recommendations.title: Jules
recommendations.overview: A flying saucer lands in the backyard of an elderly suburbanite with memory problems, who forms a bond with the scared alien inside.
